name: Medallions of Pork with Riesling Sauce
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Pork tenderloin; cut into 1-inch rounds
1/4 cup Unsalted butter; chilled, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Season pork with salt and pepper. Coat in flour; shake off excess.
2. Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a heavy skillet over medium-high heat. Add onion and garlic and sauté until golden brown, about 5 minutes. Transfer mixture to a bowl.
3. Melt remaining 2 tablespoons butter in the same skillet over medium-high heat. Add pork and sauté about 4 minutes per side. Transfer pork to a plate; tent with foil to keep warm.
4. Add onion mixture, wine, green peppercorns, and herbs to the skillet and boil until sauce thickens, about 4 minutes.
5. Add pork to the skillet and heat through. Divide pork among plates.
6. Add 1/4 cup chilled butter to the sauce in the skillet and whisk just until melted. Mix in pine nuts.
7. Spoon sauce over pork and serve.
